raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "5. Un pee Manassus Robbe-
schas no Rihta-Pusses lihds
Wakkara-Puffei / buhs weena
Datta preeksch Eewräim.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "6. Un pee Eewräima Robbe-
schas no Rihta-Pusses lihds
Wakkara-Puffei / buhs weena
Datta preeksch Rubbena.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "7. Un pee Rubbena Robbe-
schas no Rihta-Pusses lihds
Wakkara-Puffei / buhs weena
Datta preeksch Juha.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "8. Un pee Juha Robbeschäs
no Rihta-Pusses lihds Wakkara-
Puffei/ lai irr tas fwechts Sem-
mes Gabbals/ ko jums buhs at-
schirt/ diwidesfnits un peezas
tuhkstoschas mehrama Rihkstes
Platteunâ un Garrunâ/ itt ka
weena no tahm zittahm Dak-
lahm no Rihta-Pusses lihds
Wakkara-Puffei/ un tur lat ta
fwehta Weeta Widdü irr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "9. Tas fwehts Semmes
Gabbals / ko jums buhs tain
KUÑGAM afschirt / ta Gar-
tunis lait irr diwidesfnits un
peezas tuhkstoschas mehrama
Rihkstes / un tas Plattuns def-
mits tuhkstoschas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "10. Un eeksch ta lat tas fweh-
tajs Semmes Gabbals irr
preeksch teem Preestereim prett
Seemeta-Pussi/ no diwidesfnits
peezs tuhkstoschahn/ un tas Plat-
tuns prett Wakkara-Pussi no
desmits tuhkstotchahn / un tas
Garruns prett Deenas-Widdus
Pussi no diwidesfnits un peez
tuhkstoschahn mehrama Rihk-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "11. Tas buhs preeksch teem
Preestereim/ kas fwehtiti irr no
Zadaka Behrueim / kas mannu
Sargatchanu irr webrä rehmu-
schi/ kas ne irr bohkstijfschees/ kad
Israëka Behrui bohkstijahs/ ka
tee zitti Lewtti irr bohkstijfschees.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "12. Un teem buhs weenn
Gabbalu no ta fwehta Gabbala
dabbuht/ kas tas wiffuswehta-
kajs Gabbals irr pee to Lewtitu
Robbeschäs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "13. Teem Lewtteem buhs prett
to Preesteru Robbeschu dabbuht
diwidesfnits un peezas tuhksto-
schas mehrama Rihkstes Garru-
mâ / un defmits tuhkstoschas
Platteunâ/ wiss tas Garrums
laid irr diwidesfnits un peezas
tuhkstoschas/ un tas Plattuns
defmits tuhkstoschas mehrama
Rihkstes.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "14. Un teem ne buhs no ta
teneeka pahrdoht / nedä pahr-
miht/ ka tahs Semmes Birma-
jee ne tohp aisdohti/ jo tas irr
tain KUÑGAM fwehts.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "15. Bet tahs peeztuhksto-
schas/ kas Garrunâ irr atlizzi-
natas us to diwidesfnits un peez
tuhkstoscho Breekschu / tahs lai
nefwehtas irr preeksch ta Pilg-
sahta/ par Beemahjoschanu un
par Breekich.Pilgsahtu/ un tas
Pilgsahts buhs winno Widdü
buht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "16. Un schis laid irr winna
Mehrs : No Seemeta-Pusses
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
